title: Myths and Magic (Centimental)
description: This mod is specifically created for the Centimental^2 SMP. It adds unique weapons, armor, and mobs to Minecraft
body:
# **Description:**
**This mod is specifically created for the Centimental SMP. It adds unique weapons, armor, and mobs to Minecraft(that have abilities) to Minecraft 1.21  NEEDS FABRIC API**
**Revamping Staffs Next Update!**
- If you are interested in joining the server, please join this discord server. And dm one of the mods to show your interest!

# **Known Bugs**
- Chorus armor has no texture on body
- Custom Entities (black hole, mjolnir_thrown) have a black texture

# **Weapons added:**
## **Seeds of Aeons:**
- Mid-endgame item
- Every hit increases the sword's sharpness level by 1, the highest level is 50
- Once sharpness level reaches 50, the item breaks
- When you right click on the item, it splits into two, with half the damage and twice the hit speed, and resets the sharpness level
- Base damage 8, split damage 4
## **Mjolnir:**
- Endgame item
- Obtained from killing the ender dragon, drops once
- Cannot be destroyed (i.e cactus, lava, void, fire)
- When thrown, explodes on impact and strikes lightning
- Base damage 10
## **Chorus of the Void :**
- Endgame item
- Right create a black hole on hit: black hole sucks in entities in a 15 blocks radius  , cd 30 sec
- if in contact with the black hole, deals wither 5 level damage
- Base damage 9
## **Blade of Dimensions:**
- Mid-endgame item
- Every hit has a chance to freeze the opponent in time for 5 seconds
- Base damage 7
## **Thanotasian Scythe:**
- Endgame item
- Every hit has a 50% chance to heal 30% of inflicted damage
- Base damage 9
## **Sword Of Centimental:**
- Endgame item
- Able to switch between 4 modes: Devil's Blade (fire aspect), Angel's touch (lifesteal), Starfall (shoots several meteors), and Time warp (slows target on hit)
- Base damage 11

# **Armour added:**
## **Chorus Armor**
- Endgame set
- Higher durability, protection than netherite, slight kb protection
- Grants health boost 5

# **Features added**
- Chorus ore, spawns in the end, slightly less spawnrate than netherite (but its endstone, soo)
- Chorus lump, received from chorus ore
- Infused chorus fruit, crafted from dragon's breath and chorus fruit
- Chorus ingot, crafted with infused chorus fruit and chorus lump

# **Staffs added:**
## **Barrier Staff:**
- Endgame item
- summons an unbreakable semi-spherical sphere in a 17 block diameter
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
## **Dasher Staff:**
- Midgame item
- launches the player in the direction they are facing
- no fall damage after landing
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
- Level 6 launches enemies nearby with you
## **Cryomancer Staff:**
- Midgame item
- attacks with different types of freezing abilities according to level
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
## **Infernal Staff:**
- Midgame item
- attacks with different types of fiery abilities according to level
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
## **Thunderer Staff:**
- Midgame item
- attacks with different types of thunder abilities according to level
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
- Level 6 summons lightning repeatedly on entities near you for 10 seconds
## **Barbarian Staff:**
- Midgame item
- attacks with different types of rage abilities according to level
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
## **Compression Staff:**
- Endgame item
- allows the user to shrink for a set period amount of time
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
- Level 6 allows you to shrink and grow at will
## **Shulker Staff:**
- Endgame item
- teleports the user where they are looking, grants slow falling if they end up in the air
- Upgradable with xp absorbtion bottles
- Level 6 inflicts near by enemies with levitation

# **Scrolls added:**
## **Health Scroll:**
- Increases player health
## **Power Scroll:**
- Increases player attack
## **Defence Scroll:**
- Increases player defence
